Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Pitchaw Thongkom'S Further Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs ADRIANA MARQUEZ, MARIA CABRERA,and VICTORIANO BRICIO's Motion To Compel Defendant Pitchaw Thongkom'S Further Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiffs Adriana Cabrera Marquez, Maria Marquez Cabrera, and Victoriano Cabrera Bricio's Motion to Compel Defendant Pitchaw Thongkom's further production of documents to Plaintiffs' Request for Production of Documents, Set Number One is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Continued To Dec-15-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Pitchaw Thongkom And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiffs' motion to compel the deposition of Defendant Pitchaw Thongkom is GRANTED.

There is a liberal policy in favor of discovery and inquiry may be made into "any matter, not privileged, that is relevant to the subject matter... if the matter either is itself admissible in evidence or appears reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence." (CCP 2017.010.) Defendant did not object to the deposition notice and his failure to appear was without substantial justification.

Defendant Pitchaw Thongkom shall appear for deposition on the agreed-upon date of July 31, 2025. In addition, defendant Pitchaw Thongkom shall pay $2,955.85 in sanctions to Plaintiffs by July 31, 2025, since his conduct lacked substantial justification.

Order is Signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
